email.description: The email address of the recipient.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the in-app click event occurred.

campaignId.description: The identifier of the campaign associated with the in-app click.

templateId.description: The identifier of the template used for the in-app message.

messageId.description: The unique identifier of the message.

clickedUrl.description: The URL that was clicked within the in-app message.

sentAt.description: The timestamp when the in-app message was originally sent.

expiresAt.description: The timestamp when the in-app message expires.

deviceInfo.description: Information about the device where the in-app message was clicked.

deviceId.description: The unique identifier of the device.

platform.description: The platform of the device (e.g., iOS, Android).

appPackageName.description: The package name of the application.

messageContext.description: Context information about the in-app message.

saveToInbox.description: Whether the message is saved to the user's inbox.

silentInbox.description: Whether the message is silently added to the inbox.

location.description: The location context for the in-app message display.

documentCreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the document was created.

documentUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the document was last updated.
